content.text: I'll start by examining the current cluster state.

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb get pods -o wide 2>&1; echo "---STATEFULSET---"; kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset 2>&1

input.command: kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}{"\n"}'; echo "---UPDATE STRATEGY---"; kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.updateStrategy}{"\n"}'; echo "---VERSION---"; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SHOW CLUSTER SETTING version;" 2>&1; echo "---PRESERVE---"; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SHOW CLUSTER SETTING cluster.preserve_downgrade_option;" 2>&1
